creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
* kcontrol
 * /usr/libexec/ld-elf.so.1 : Shared Object "libtiff.so.4" not found.

Are you sure it didn't complain about missing packages and you ignored
the error? :)

This is fresh from the master ftp site:

===
>> pkg_info -f packages-3.1-release/All/kdebase-1.1.tgz | grep tiff
        Package depends on: tiff-3.4               <=======
File: share/mimelnk/image/tiff.kdelnk
===

-W
